sections.paragraph:
- Original: στάμνος

- Transliteration: Stamnos

- Phonetic: stam'-nos

- Definition:

1. among the Greeks an earthen jar, into which wine was drawn off for keeping but also used for other purposes

a. of the little jar in which the manna was kept, laid up in the ark of the covenant

- Origin: from the base of G2476 (as stationary)

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine

- Strong's: From the base of G2476 (as stationary); a jar or earthen tank: - pot.
